RDV

Data Fuels Physical AI Embodied AI

Our Product

Egocentric Data / Motion Capture / Sim-to-Real Crafted for Physical AI Training

Our Feature

Data Collection

Efficiently collect robot device data with multi-protocol support

  • Multi-protocol Support
  • Real-time Collection
  • Edge Computing

Smart Processing

    AI-driven intelligent data processing and analytics

  • AI Analytics
  • Auto Classification
  • Pattern Recognition

Security

    Standardized RESTful API for easy integration

  • End-to-end Encryption
  • Access Control
  • Audit Logging

Our Goal

To become the backbone of robotic intelligence by providing high-quality data infrastructure for the Physical AI era. We empower robots to learn, adapt, and evolve through reliable data collection, processing, and analytics.
